entries.title: Started the dedicated Pixelbox landing page
entries.summary: Pixelbox now has its own product-facing page instead of living only as a repo or a mention on the personal site.
points: Positioned Pixelbox as a standalone Pixel Claw Labs product
Added a public changelog surface for ongoing release notes
Set up the site to deploy cleanly from a Vercel subdirectory

entries.title: Added vibrant macOS window treatment and drag behavior
entries.summary: The Electron shell now leans into the native desktop feel with transparent and vibrant window styling plus cleaner drag regions.
points: Terminal panel now uses transparent xterm layers with glass styling
Projects panel got its own stronger frosted treatment and drag behavior
Top-level app drag strip preserves the titleless look while keeping the window movable

entries.title: Tightened the local workspace loop
entries.summary: Pixelbox continued shifting from a simple Electron shell into a project-aware software workspace.
points: Project switching and runtime continuity were stabilized
Preview navigation and runtime controls became more reliable
Electron and Playwright flows expanded to cover long-session behavior
